channel.title: phd on wil oc ward | university of sheffield
channel.description: Recent content in phd on wil oc ward | university of sheffield

item.title: Development and application of machine learning techniques for characterisation and quantification of change in time-lapse resistivity monitoring
item.description: This project was part of a collaborative effort and joint supervision with British Geological Survey addressing the need for automatic feature detection and interpretation 3D time-lapse images of subsurface geology obtained through electrical resistivity tomography. The interdisciplinary work combined new techniques in computer vision and change recognition in increased dimension to identify, predict and understand changes to and caused by complex hydro-geophysical processes. Results were be verified through a combination of synthetic, experimental and field models.
